titleStmt.title: SII 19.308: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 308. (A.R. No. 379 of 1924.) MĒLAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CHŌḶĒŚVARA SHRINE, AGASTYĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The king's name is specifically given as Uttama-Chōḷa in this inscription. It records a gift of 96 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp in the northern shrine of the temple of Mahādēva of Avanigandarva-Īśvaragṛiham at Mannu-Perumpaḻuvūr in Kuṉrakkūṟṟam by Śukaṉ Kaliyaṉ Araṅgaṉ on behalf of his wife Dēvaḍi Pugaḻarai the daughter of Kaṇḍaṉ Dēvaḍi of Nāvalūr.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakesarivarmmaṟku yāṇṭu Uttamacoḻa[deva*]ṟku yāṇṭu 10 2Āvatu kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu maṉṉup perumpaḻuvūr
devatāṉam Avaṉikkan=tarvva Īśvaragṛhattu mahādevarkku vaṭavāy śrī koyilukku nāvalūruṭaiyāṉ kaṇṭaṉ ṟevaṭi makaḷ tevaṭi pukaḻaṟaikku Ivaḷ
bharttā cukaṉ kaliyaṉ Araṅkaṉ Iddevarkku Iravum pakalum Eriya vaitta noṉtā viḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku nicatam ney nārāyattāl ce Uḻakkukku vaitta
cāvāmuvāpperāṭu toṇṇūṟṟāṟu Ivvāṭu koṇṭom maṟavaṉneṟi maṉṟāṭi muṇṭaṉ caṅkaṉum tāḻieṟaṉum periyāṉ caṭaiyaṉum pe
riyāṉ picaṅkaṉum kecaṉ maḻapāṭiyum kavaripurattu maṉṟāṭi vaṭukaṉ vaiykāvaṭikaḷum kuṉṟakaṇṇaṉum centaṉ vaṭukaṉum kaṇṇan Eḻuvaṉ Ivaṉaivo
m Iṉṉey Aṭṭuvomānom Ivvaṉaivom Itthanmam rakṣippar Avanikandharvvapurattu nakarattār panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.308 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
